prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类2024年热度评估为推荐、电子信息/通信类为高热推荐、电气工程及其自动化为高热推荐，这些专业与西南财大物理类招生的计算机类、统计学类、金融科技等方向相关。甘肃省2026年高考报名总人数约218700人，较2025年大幅增加。按近年物理类占比约67% 估算，2026年物理类考生约146000人，较2025年121443人增加约20%，考生规模扩大将加剧整体竞争。；西南财经大学位于 四川成都，与甘肃同属西部地区，地理距离较近，是甘肃考生报考财经类院校的重要选择。2026年物理类大幅扩招至81人，表明该校在甘肃物理类的招生力度显著加大，可能吸引 更多考生报考。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15378名、2026年大幅扩招约37.3%（显著缓解竞争）、甘肃省物理类考生增加约20%（加剧竞争）、声誉平稳、优势学科与 招生专业匹配度高等因素，扩招效应明显大于考生增加效应，整体竞争趋于缓和。预测2026年最低位次约18768名，区间18268–19268名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 4845 → 18111 → 10678 → 8615 → 15378, showing extreme volatility. In 2022, there was a severe gap (ranking plummeted to 18111), and from 2023 to 2024, it quickly recovered to 10678 and 8615, but in 2025, it significantly dropped again to 15378. In the past two years, the fluctuation range was about 6700 places, with the 2025 baseline ranking around 15378. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category (including former Science Category) was: 56 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 58 in 2024, 59 in 2025, and in 2026 (enrollment plan document) it significantly increased to 81, an expansion of about 37.3% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, meaning a substantial increase in admission slots, which notably alleviates overall competition pressure for candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 66th, with stable rankings between 65 and 76 in recent years, making it a top-tier finance and economics institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92, with an average evaluation. In recent years, there have been no incidents of admission cutoff line gaps or anomalies, and the psychological expectations for applicants are relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-. Among the majors enrolled in Physics Category, Statistics, Economic Statistics, Financial Mathematics, Actuarial Science, etc., directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, while Computer Science, Management Science and Engineering, and other new engineering majors also have good disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity evaluation for Computer Science is recommended, for Electronic Information/Communication is highly recommended, and for Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended. These majors are related to the Computer Science, Statistics, and Financial Technology directions enrolled in Physics Category at Southwestern University of Finance and Economics. The total number of registered candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67%, it is estimated that there will be about 146,000 Physics Category candidates in 2026, an increase of about 20% from 121,443 in 2025. The expansion of the candidate pool will intensify overall competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, which is in the same western region as Gansu, with a relatively close geographical distance, making it an important choice for Gansu candidates applying to finance and economics institutions. The significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment to 81 in 2026 indicates that the university's enrollment efforts in Gansu Physics Category have notably increased, which may attract more candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15378, the significant enrollment expansion of about 37.3% in 2026 (notably alleviating competition), the increase in Gansu Physics Category candidates by about 20% (intensifying competition), stable reputation, and high match between advantageous disciplines and enrolled majors, the expansion effect is clearly greater than the candidate increase effect, leading to an overall easing of competition. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for 2026 will be approximately 18768, with a range of 18268–19268.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 18768, with a range of 18268–19268. If your ranking is within this range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main choice, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit (<18268), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Accounting CPA direction, Finance Innovation Experimental Class, etc.). If your ranking is near the lower limit (>19268), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 as the main choice, supplemented by Tier 2. With Southwestern University of Finance and Economics significantly expanding Physics Category enrollment to 81 in 2026, application opportunities have notably increased, and interdisciplinary majors such as Statistics and Computer Science are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 1728 → 1050 → 833 → 2078 → 1360, showing significant fluctuations. From 2021 to 2023, the liberal arts rankings continuously moved forward (from 1728 to 833). In 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao, the History Category ranking dropped sharply to 2078, then rebounded to 1360 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 700 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 1360 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) in Gansu Province: 36 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 36 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 35 in 2025, and increased to 40 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), an expansion of about 14.3% compared to 2025. Expansion means an increase in admission slots, which alleviates overall competitive pressure for candidates, but the expansion is limited.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 66th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 65 and 76, maintaining a stable upper-middle level and being one of the top finance and economics institutions. During the 2026 Gaokao cycle, its reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, involving only routine management topics such as appointment-based campus entry policies, with no major negative public opinion. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd, with an average evaluation, and short video exposure is at a medium level. There have been no records of cutoff line drops or anomalies in recent years, and the psychological expectations for applications are relatively stable. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A+ (top in the country), Business Administration was rated A, and Statistics was rated A-. These three core disciplines have outstanding strength, closely corresponding to the university's enrollment majors such as Finance, Business Administration, Public Finance, and Statistics, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity assessment for Finance/Economics/Economy majors is divided and wait-and-see, still relatively hot but with internal differentiation. Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors are recommended, and Computer majors are recommended. The total number of Gaokao registrants in Gansu Province for 2026 is approximately 218,700, a significant increase of about 21.6% compared to 2025 (approximately 179,817). Based on the recent History Category proportion of about 33%, the estimated number of History Category candidates in 2026 is about 73,000, an increase of about 25% from 58,374 in 2025, which will intensify overall competition. Southwestern University of Finance and Economics is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the same western region as Gansu, with close geographical distance and low climate and cultural adaptation costs. It has historically been an important choice for Gansu candidates applying to finance and economics institutions. The university's History Category enrollment in Gansu accounts for a moderate proportion of its total national History Category plan, with no obvious signals of regional preference changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1360, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 14.3% (alleviating competition), the increase of History Category candidates in Gansu Province by about 25% (intensifying competition), stable reputation, and strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the expansion and candidate increase offset each other, making overall competition slightly more intense. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 1507, with a range of 1236–1778.
